results.title: NC Rejects PDP’s Backdoor Appointment Charge
results.description: Kashmir, Observer, Jammu, Srinagar, Latest Kashmir News, Kashmir News, Kashmir Latest News The Jammu and Kashmir government on Sunday strongly rejected the People's Democratic Party's allegations of backdoor appointments through outsourcing, asserting that all engagements have been made transparently and in accordance with an outsourcing policy framed during the PDP-BJP government. The post NC Rejects PDP’s Backdoor Appointment Charge appeared first on Kashmir Observer .

results.title: Next avatar of BRS could be ‘HRS’: Komatireddy
results.description: Komatireddy Venkat Reddy mocks BRS, says it may become “HRS” as Harish Rao rises; dismisses HAM road scam claims, flags Rs 13,006-cr works.

results.title: Strawberry Moon 2026: How to Watch Full Moon? Check Date, Time, When to Watch, Lunar Energy, Why is it called Strawberry Moon & All You Need to Know
results.description: The nickname of the Moon originated with Indigenous North American peoples, including the Algonquian, Ojibwe, Dakota, and Lakota nations. They tracked seasonal changes by naming each full moon after natural milestones in their environment. The post Strawberry Moon 2026: How to Watch Full Moon? Check Date, Time, When to Watch, Lunar Energy, Why is it called Strawberry Moon & All You Need to Know appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .

results.title: WATCH: Abhishek Sharma Fan Gets His Autograph On Her Arm To Get It Tattooed Ahead Of India Vs Ireland 2nd T20I In Belfast
results.description: Abhishek happily agreed and signed her arm with a marker before the fan left to get the signature inked as a tattoo. The moment was captured on video and quickly went viral on social media, with many fans reacting to the level of admiration shown for the Indian cricketer.

results.title: Eugenio Chacarra Takes Commanding Lead at Open d'Italia
results.description: Eugenio Chacarra has taken a commanding lead at the Open d'Italia, showcasing remarkable skill with a six-under 65. As he aims for his second title of the season, the competition remains fierce with Joaquin Niemann and Matt Wallace closely trailing. With changes to the final round schedule due to weather forecasts, the excitement builds as Chacarra prepares to defend his lead. Discover the details of this thrilling tournament and the players vying for victory.
